item.title: I was so shocked to find how many of my fellow cat mommies/daddies didnt know that lillies were toxic (myself included). I hope this video spreads awareness, especially prior to valentines day, so we can protect our little loves 🐾💗 #cats #kitten #valenti
item.description: By @biiishta: I was so shocked to find how many of my fellow cat mommies/daddies didnt know that lillies were toxic (myself included). I hope this video spreads awareness, especially prior to valentines day, so we can protect our little loves 🐾💗 #cats #kitten #valenti
